scroll_found.title: Research the Void Gate scroll at a Research Pedestal

portal_complete.title: Confirm End Remastered portal complete — all 12 eyes placed, portal open

subtitle.text: 12 eyes. 12 civilizations. One gate. The portal does not open until you have carried all of them.

description: CH.12 · THE VOID GATE
▸ The Void Gate scroll is the last record
of what the portal system was designed to do.
It does not describe where the portal goes.
It describes why it was built.
Read it after you open the gate.
Not before.
◈ PORTAL COMPLETION CHECKLIST
└ 9 custom eyes: all civilization bosses defeated
Black / Lost / Old / Cold / Rogue / Cryptic /
Magical / Corrupted / Cursed
└ 3 anchor eyes: Wither Eye + Guardian Eye + Nether Eye
└ Portal frame: 12 active frames in stronghold
└ 20-minute re-entry timer: honored between placements
(do not place all eyes in one session unless
you have been stockpiling for 20+ minutes each)
◈ POST-PORTAL CONTENT (END REMASTERED)
└ The End dimension: expanded via End Remastered
└ True End / Beyond the Dream: separate dimension
accessible post-dragon via Dimensional Tears bottle
└ Ender Guardian + Harbinger + Primordial:
Cataclysm bosses that only spawn post-portal
└ Eldritch Theory scroll: End Endermen at 5%
└ Boundless scroll: Shulkers at 15%
◈ SCROLL: The Void Gate
└ Found in End-adjacent ruin structures,
post-Wither Storm loot caches, End stronghold
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: full post-portal End lore,
Cataclysm post-portal boss access, void exploration guide
▸ The gate was built by people who knew
they would never use it.
They built it for whoever came after.
The scroll is addressed to you.
It says: 'The void is not empty.
We left everything we knew inside it.
Take it.'
▶ Find The Void Gate scroll [check]
▶ Complete the End Remastered portal [check]
◇ Beyond the Dream (True End) is Ch13+ content.
Open the main End portal first.
The Dimensional Tears bottle for True End
is crafted from End-dimension materials.
